name_en: Pre-order 🀄️ OHANEL Calfskin Tote Bag. Suitable for daily commuting, casual shopping, and airport travel. Can be carried by hand or over the shoulder. Large capacity and very practical, fits a laptop 💻. New rhombus basket bag style 🧺✨. Vintage gold hardware with logo. The basket shape brings out a retro vibe. Extra-large space to meet all your capacity needs. Comes with a top handle and long chain strap ⛓. Can be worn over the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand. Soft and delicate calfskin, excellent texture and great feel!
